ios.label: iPhone Air and iPhone 17 models
ios.note: For iPhone Air and iPhone 17 models.

ios.label: iPhone 11 through iPhone 16 models
ios.note: For iPhone 11 through iPhone 16 Pro/Pro Max models.

platformCompatibilityNotes.ios: iOS 26.5.1 for iPhone Air and iPhone 17 models; iOS 26.5 for iPhone 11 through iPhone 16 Pro/Pro Max models.
platformCompatibilityNotes.macos: macOS 26.5.1 Tahoe for modern Macs including MacBook, iMac, Mac mini, Mac Studio, and Mac Pro.
platformCompatibilityNotes.ipados: iPadOS 26.5 for supported iPad, iPad Air, iPad mini, and iPad Pro models.
platformCompatibilityNotes.watchos: watchOS 26.5 for Apple Watch Series 6 and newer.
platformCompatibilityNotes.tvos: tvOS 26.5 for Apple TV HD and Apple TV 4K models.
